name: Kraken
description: The Kraken is a heavy pistol of Grineer design that fires two quick shots with a single pull of the trigger. Skilled marksmen will appreciate the value in this deadly accurate weapon.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Kraken is a heavy pistol of Grineer design that fires two quick shots with a single pull of the trigger. Skilled marksmen will appreciate the value in this deadly accurate weapon.

components.name: Neurodes
components.description:
Biotech sensor organ harvested from Infested entities.

Location: Earth, Lua, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Polymer Bundle
components.description:
A hard, thermoplastic casing. Manufactured by Corpus.

Location: Mercury, Venus, and Uranus

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.4
patchlogs.changes: Hydroid Rakkam Kraken will now be the deluxe version when casting Undertow.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Hydroid Rakkam Kraken not having its deluxe Skin applied during Undertow.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23.3.0 + 23.3.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Kraken sounds not being muffled correctly during stealth effects.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.4.2
patchlogs.changes:
Improved the cast FX detail on the Kraken spawned from Hydroid’s Tentacle Swarm.
Fixed Hydroid’s Tentacle Swarm Kraken appearing lower for Clients.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Update 21.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Hold onto your ships, Tentacle Swarm has received a new look straight from the depths of the sea! Can you summon the Kraken?

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed caches on Kuva Fortress/Dakata giving rewards from the incorrect table (thereby not dropping Cyclone Kraken as intended).

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted the melee impact sounds for Hydroid Kraken tentacles in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.4
patchlogs.changes: The following weapons have now been balanced for use in PvP: Sybaris, Karak, Kraken, Viper, Angstrum, AKViper, WraithViper and Tigris.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue with Hydroid’s Kraken spawning in random spawn positions on clients.

patchlogs.name: Update 9.5: Operation Arid Fear
patchlogs.changes:
Added custom reload animations for Dera, Supra, Lanka, Ogris, Lex, and Kraken.
Added custom reload sounds for Strun, Dera, Supra, Gorgon, Ignis, Grakata, Acrid, Kraken, Hek, and Lex.

patchlogs.name: Update 6.3 - "make Love, Not War(Frame)"
patchlogs.additions: New weapon added: Grineer Heavy Pistol (Kraken)
